title: Create 6+ Early Adopter
description: Create 6.0+ with additions, complementary, and performance mods.
body:
A Create 6 modpack with additions, complementary, and performance mods. 

The purpose of this pack is as the title would describe, early mods for Create 6.0.8+ for 1.20.1, and additions included as they're supported. The pack is absolutely playable, some additions might be made or some removed. I'll update this pack along with the Clientpack+Serverpack as well, hyperlinks provided when that page is accepted by the Modrinth team.

The ultimate goal of this pack is to seemlessly transition from Create 5, and build up the pack to a comprehensive Kitchen-Sink all inclusive type modpack. It's not there yet, when the pack starts to branch out into more categories of mods I'll make it a seperate pack on Modrinth.



**Client Resourcepacks/Shaderpacks**

Currently /overrides is not distributing clientpacks as it should, if you want the resourcepacks/shaderpacks shipped with the pack you will have to extract and drag the files out of /Client Additions in the root directory of the modpack. Not sure if this will be fixed in the near future.



**Mods that will be in the pack from Create**

- Create: Jetpacks 
- Copycats+
- Dreams and Desires
- Enchantment Industry
- Power Loader
- Big Cannons
- Interactive
- Blazing Hot
- New Age
- ~~Framed~~
- Proximity
- Sifter
- Utilities

As these mods are updated they'll make their way into the pack, when Create: Dreams and Desires, and Create: New Age are implemented, the overworld will need to be regenerated as it introduces new blocks. In the event of this, World edit is also implemented to quickly rebuild player changed enviroments in the overworld. Alternatively you can use NBTExplorer to regenerate your underground.



**Server compatible**

Works as intended



**Troubleshooting:**

Java 21+ is required. 
Windows direct link download:
https://download.oracle.com/java/21/archive/jdk-21.0.8_windows-x64_bin.zip

Linux, MacOS or Other: https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/javase/jdk21-archive-downloads.html

Bug: Electrum Block recipe - fixed in the next update

Bug: Create Mechanical Cobblestone Generator texture bug - not detrimental
